description: Immutable RKB evidence snapshot containing CCW dictionary specifications, types, constraints, and valid values for CMS 2021 baseline files.

BENE_ID.name: BENE_ID
BENE_ID.label: Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID
BENE_ID.description: Unique identifier for the beneficiary assigned by CCW.

BENE_BIRTH_DT.name: BENE_BIRTH_DT
BENE_BIRTH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Birth
BENE_BIRTH_DT.description: Date of birth of the beneficiary in YYYYMMDD format.

BENE_DEATH_DT.name: BENE_DEATH_DT
BENE_DEATH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Death
BENE_DEATH_DT.description: Date of death of the beneficiary if deceased; null otherwise.

CLM_ID.name: CLM_ID
CLM_ID.label: Claim Control Number
CLM_ID.description: Unique identifier for a claim submitted by a provider or facility.

CLM_FROM_DT.name: CLM_FROM_DT
CLM_FROM_DT.label: Claim Start Date
CLM_FROM_DT.description: The date of service start for carrier line or admission/start for outpatient claim.

CLM_THRU_DT.name: CLM_THRU_DT
CLM_THRU_DT.label: Claim Through Date
CLM_THRU_DT.description: The date of service end for carrier line or discharge/end for outpatient claim.

ICD_DGNS_CD1.name: ICD_DGNS_CD1
ICD_DGNS_CD1.label: Primary Diagnosis Code (ICD-10-CM)
ICD_DGNS_CD1.description: Primary ICD-10-CM diagnosis code associated with the claim event.

constraints.description: CLM_FROM_DT must be less than or equal to CLM_THRU_DT.
BENE_ID on Carrier or Outpatient claim must exist in Beneficiary Summary file.
